valid_tags_format.description: Format of input.valid_tags when valid_tags is provided. yaml/json are strict modes; auto explicitly tries yaml->json.

infer_tag.description: Whether to run metadata/digest-driven supplemental inference in controlled-vocabulary mode. In pure inference mode, false does not disable all suggestion generation when evidence exists.

tag_note_language.description: Optional language intent for suggest_tags[].note (recommended BCP 47, e.g. zh-CN/en-US). This parameter must not affect other output fields or decision logic.
